title: Weekend Lawn Mowing & Yard Cleanup
description: Need someone reliable to mow the front and back lawn, trim the edges, and bag the clippings every other weekend. Small yard, should take about an hour.

title: Flower Bed Weeding and Mulching
description: Two flower beds along the front walkway need weeding and a fresh layer of mulch. I'll provide the mulch bags, you bring the tools. About 2 hours of work.

title: Hedge Trimming and Shrub Shaping
description: Six overgrown boxwood shrubs and a long hedge need trimming and shaping. Must have your own hedge trimmer. Cleanup of clippings included.

title: Fall Leaf Raking (Large Corner Lot)
description: Big corner lot with several mature trees drops a ton of leaves. Need them raked, bagged, and set out for city pickup. Yard waste bags provided.

title: Garden Bed Installation & Planting
description: Building two raised vegetable beds from a kit and planting starter vegetables. Looking for someone with gardening experience to assemble, fill with soil, and plant. Half-day job.

title: Deep Clean for 2-Bedroom Apartment
description: Thorough move-out deep clean: kitchen appliances inside and out, two bathrooms, baseboards, floors, and windows. Supplies provided. About 3-4 hours.

title: Weekly House Cleaning (3 Bed / 2 Bath)
description: Looking for a recurring weekly clean of a 3-bedroom home: dusting, vacuuming, mopping, kitchen, and bathrooms. Consistent day each week preferred.

title: Post-Party Kitchen & Living Room Cleanup
description: Hosted a birthday party and need help the next morning cleaning the kitchen, wiping counters, taking out trash, and vacuuming the living room. Roughly 2 hours.

title: Office Cleaning for Small Business
description: Small 5-room office needs an evening clean twice a week: trash, restrooms, break room, and floors. Looking for someone dependable and detail-oriented.

title: Refrigerator and Oven Deep Clean
description: Just need the fridge and oven scrubbed inside and out — they've been neglected. Bring your own cleaning supplies. Should take about 90 minutes.

title: After-School Math Tutor (7th Grade)
description: Seeking a patient tutor to help my 7th grader with pre-algebra twice a week over video call. Goal is to build confidence before end-of-year exams.

title: High School Chemistry Help
description: My daughter needs help with 11th grade chemistry — balancing equations and stoichiometry. Prefer in-person at our home or the public library, one hour twice weekly.

title: Beginner Spanish Conversation Practice
description: Adult learner looking for a native or fluent Spanish speaker for casual conversation practice over video, one hour a week. Patience appreciated!

title: SAT Prep Tutoring (Math Section)
description: Junior preparing for the SAT needs focused help on the math section. Looking for someone familiar with the current test format and practice strategies.

title: Elementary Reading Tutor
description: My 2nd grader needs help building reading fluency and comprehension. Looking for a warm, encouraging tutor for 45-minute sessions after school.

title: Fix a Leaky Kitchen Sink
description: The pipe under my kitchen sink has a slow leak and the faucet drips. Need someone with plumbing experience to diagnose and repair. Parts can be reimbursed.

title: Replace a Running Toilet
description: Toilet runs constantly and the flapper/fill valve need replacing, or possibly a new toilet install. Looking for someone who can assess and fix same-day.

title: Install a New Bathroom Faucet
description: Bought a new bathroom faucet and need it installed, with the old one removed. Should be a straightforward job for someone experienced. Faucet already on hand.

title: Unclog Basement Floor Drain
description: Basement floor drain is backing up. Need someone with a drain snake to clear the clog and check that it's draining properly. Water access available.

title: Saturday Evening Babysitter for Two Kids
description: Need a trustworthy babysitter for our 4- and 6-year-old on Saturday evening (5-10pm). Dinner is prepped; mostly playtime and bedtime routine.

title: Weekday After-School Sitter
description: Looking for someone to pick up my 8-year-old from school, bring him home, help with a snack and homework until I get off work around 6pm. Mon-Wed.

title: Date-Night Babysitter for One Toddler
description: My wife and I want a Friday night out. Need a sitter for our 2-year-old from 6-10pm. Experience with toddlers and bedtime routines a big plus.

title: Full-Day Summer Babysitting
description: Need full-day care (8am-5pm) for two kids (5 and 7) a few days a week this summer. Activities, lunch, and outings to the park. References required.

title: Help Moving a Couch and Boxes
description: Moving a few blocks away and need an extra set of hands for a couch, a mattress, and about 15 boxes. Truck is already rented — just need muscle for two hours.

title: Two Movers for Studio Apartment
description: Moving out of a 3rd-floor studio (no elevator) into a nearby house. Need two strong movers for about 3 hours. Furniture is light but stairs are involved.

title: Load a Moving Truck
description: Everything is boxed and ready — I just need help loading a 16-foot truck efficiently so nothing shifts. Should take about 2 hours with the right person.

title: Move Furniture Between Rooms
description: Rearranging my house and need help moving a heavy dresser, bookshelf, and bed frame between rooms and up a short staircase. About an hour of lifting.

title: Mount a TV on Drywall
description: Need a 55-inch TV wall-mounted over the fireplace with the cables concealed. Mount and hardware already purchased. Must find the studs and level it properly.

title: Assemble IKEA Furniture
description: Two IKEA dressers and a bookshelf need assembling. All boxes and instructions are here; just need someone handy with tools and patience for the little pegs.

title: Patch and Paint Drywall Holes
description: A few nail holes and one fist-sized hole in the hallway drywall need patching, sanding, and painting to match. Paint provided. Small but detail-oriented job.

title: Fix a Sticking Interior Door
description: Bedroom door sticks and won't latch properly — probably needs the hinges adjusted or the door planed a bit. Quick job for someone who knows what they're doing.

title: Bridal Hair and Makeup
description: Getting married next month and need a stylist for bridal hair and makeup on the morning of, at our venue. Trial session beforehand preferred. Portfolio a must.

title: Box Braids Appointment
description: Looking for an experienced braider for medium-sized box braids, mid-back length. I'll bring my own hair. Please share photos of past work when you reach out.

title: At-Home Gel Manicure
description: Want a gel manicure done at my home this weekend. I have a small setup but you'd need to bring your lamp and polishes. Simple, clean design.

title: Men's Haircut and Beard Trim
description: Looking for a mobile barber to come to my place for a clean fade and beard lineup. Would love to make this a recurring monthly thing if it goes well.

title: Grocery Delivery (Weekly)
description: I'm elderly and need help picking up a weekly grocery order and bringing it inside. List and payment provided in advance. Reliability is the most important thing.

title: Pick Up and Deliver Furniture
description: Bought a dresser off Marketplace across town and need someone with a truck to pick it up and drop it at my apartment. One flight of stairs on delivery.

title: Same-Day Document Courier
description: Need signed documents picked up from my office and dropped at a law firm across town today. Small envelope, must be handled carefully and delivered by 4pm.

title: Weekly Meal Prep Delivery Runs
description: I run a small meal-prep side business and need help delivering 8-10 orders around town every Sunday afternoon. Insulated bags provided; you provide the car.

title: Dog Walking (Twice Daily)
description: Need someone to walk my energetic Labrador twice a day (morning and early evening) while I'm at work this week. 20-30 minute walks around the neighborhood.

title: Cat Sitting While I'm Away
description: Traveling for 5 days and need someone to stop by once daily to feed my two cats, refresh water, and scoop the litter box. A little playtime appreciated.

title: Personal Grocery Shopper & Organizer
description: Looking for help with weekly errands: grocery shopping from my list and putting things away, plus tidying the pantry. About 2-3 hours, flexible day.
